description_long: This object is a stylized doll with a slender, elongated form and a smooth, hard exterior. The body appears to be composed of a single, continuous piece with sharply defined edges and a minimalist design, lacking visible facial features or articulated limbs. The surface is predominantly black with a thin, contrasting white edge running along one side, giving it a modern, abstract appearance. There are no visible joints, clothing details, or accessories, suggesting a highly simplified or artistic representation of a doll. The overall silhouette is tall and narrow, with a flat profile and no discernible base or stand. The object is likely made from molded plastic or resin, typical for decorative or collectible dolls.
description: A tall, slender, minimalist doll with a smooth black surface and a thin white edge, featuring no visible facial features or clothing details.
description_view_0: This view shows a mostly black, flat surface with a sharp vertical edge, highlighting the object's slim profile.
description_view_1: Here, the thin white edge is visible along the side, contrasting with the black main body and emphasizing the object's narrowness.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the full length of the object, with the black surface dominating and the white edge running vertically.
description_view_3: The view is mostly black with a diagonal edge, showing the object's flatness and the continuation of the white border.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll has a minimalist, abstract design with no discernible garments, patterns, or fashion influences.
attribute_pose: The doll is depicted in a static, upright position with no visible articulation of the head, arms, or legs; the form is continuous and unsegmented.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present on the doll's surface.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle; the head is smooth and featureless.
